reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: A significant portion of the document is missing from the JSON output. Specifically, Pages 12 through 29 are absent. This range contains the entirety of Indicators 3, 4, 5, 6, and 7, including historical data, FFY 2015 performance data, required actions, and correction of noncompliance sections for each. The JSON includes placeholder sections explicitly stating these pages were not converted.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Pages 12-29 containing Indicator 3 (Early Childhood Outcomes), Indicator 4 (Family Involvement), Indicator 5 (Child Find Birth to One), Indicator 6 (Child Find Birth to Three), and Indicator 7 (45-day timeline).
concerns.output_quote: The JSON jumps from Indicator 2 (ending page 11) directly to Indicator 8 (starting page 30), with placeholders '[Pages 11-21 unavailable]' and '[Pages 21-31 unavailable]'.
concerns.location: Between element index heading-40 and heading-41 (reading_order 8 and 9)

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy is inconsistent and broken across major sections. While section titles are defined in the JSON metadata for every section, the corresponding text from the source document is missing from the 'elements' array as navigable heading elements in several cases (e.g., sections 2, 6, 9, 10, 12, and 13). For example, Section 9 (Indicator 8A) begins with 'Baseline Data: 2005' instead of the Indicator title. Conversely, Section 14 correctly includes its title as heading-45. This incon
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 31 heading: 'Indicator 8A: Early Childhood Transition'; Page 36 heading: 'Indicator 8B: Early Childhood Transition'; Page 41 heading: 'Indicator 8C: Early Childhood Transition'.
concerns.output_quote: Section 9 index 0: 'Baseline Data: 2005' (The main indicator title is missing from the elements array). Section 10 index 0: 'Baseline Data: 2005'.

concerns.analysis: The reading order diverges materially from the source document due to the handling of missing pages. Approximately 20 pages of the original document (Indicators 3 through 7) are missing from their logical sequential positions. While placeholders are provided (Sections 15 and 16), they are appended to the end of the JSON (reading_order 15 and 16) following the conclusion of the document (Section 14, page 60). concerns.output_quote: The JSON sequence is Section 8 (Page 11 content) followed by Section 9 (Page 31 content). The missing content placeholders for pages 11-31 are placed at the very end of the file (Sections 15 and 16) instead of between sections 8 and 9.
